==Pokémon==
This listing is of Sawyer's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{MissingInfo|1|java}}
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sawyer
|pkmn=Sceptile
|mega=yes
|main=Sawyer's Sceptile

|stage2=Grovyle
|type1=Grass
|img=Sawyer Sceptile.png
|cap=Sawyer's Sceptile
|img2=Sawyer Mega Sceptile.png
|cap2=Sawyer's Mega Sceptile
|epnum=XY064
|epname=Battling with Elegance and a Big Smile!
|vajp=Yūji Ueda
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Sceptile}} is Sawyer's first partner Pokémon. In ''[[XY075|Rivals: Today and Tomorrow!]]'', it was revealed that it was given to him by [[Professor Birch]] as a {{p|Treecko}}. Later in the episode, it evolved into {{p|Grovyle}} while battling [[Ash's Frogadier]].

In ''[[XY106|A Meeting of Two Journeys!]]'', it was revealed that Grovyle had evolved into Sceptile.

In ''[[XY126|Valuable Experience for All!]]'', it was revealed that Sceptile was equipped with a [[Sceptilite]], enabling it to [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolve]].}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sawyer
|pkmn=Salamence
|stage2=Shelgon
|stage1=Bagon
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Flying
|img=Sawyer {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Bagon|1=Shelgon}}.png
|cap=Sawyer's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Bagon|1=Shelgon}}
|img2=Sawyer Salamence.png
|epnum=XY073
|epname=A Fashionable Battle!
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=Carter Cathcart
|vaennote=as Bagon
|vaen2=Justin Anselmi
|vaen2note=as Shelgon
|vaen3=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen3note=as Salamence
|desc={{p|Salamence}} first appeared as a {{p|Bagon}} in ''[[XY073|A Fashionable Battle!]]'', where it was used in a [[Double Battle]] alongside {{p|Treecko}} against [[Ash's Frogadier]] and {{AP|Hawlucha}} until they postponed the battle. It was also used to battle [[Valerie]]'s {{p|Spritzee}} but lost.

In ''[[XY075|Rivals: Today and Tomorrow!]]'', Bagon participated in Sawyer's three-on-three battle with Ash. It battled against {{AP|Pikachu}}, but lost.

In ''[[XY106|A Meeting of Two Journeys!]]'', it was revealed that Bagon had evolved into {{p|Shelgon}}. It battled against Hawlucha and lost.

It reappeared in ''[[XY128|A Riveting Rivalry!]]'' during Sawyer's [[Lumiose Conference]] semi-final battle against Ash, where it was revealed to have evolved into Salamence. It battled against [[Ash's Noivern]] and eventually tied with him.

It appeared again in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', during a flashback.

Salamence's known moves are {{m|Fire Fang}}, {{m|Dragon Breath}}, {{m|Headbutt}}, {{m|Dragon Claw}}, {{m|Dragon Rush}}, {{m|Incinerate}}, {{m|Dragon Tail}}, and {{m|Protect}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sawyer
|pkmn=Slurpuff
|gender=male
|type1=Fairy
|img=Sawyer Slurpuff.png
|epnum=XY075
|epname=Rivals: Today and Tomorrow!
|vajp=Hitomi Nabatame
|vaen=Haven Paschall
|desc={{p|Slurpuff}} first appeared in ''[[XY075|Rivals: Today and Tomorrow!]]'', where he was used to find Sawyer's notebook using his strong sense of smell. Later he participated in Sawyer's three-on-three battle with {{Ash}}. He battled Hawlucha and lost, despite the type-advantage.

In ''[[XY126|Valuable Experience for All!]]'', Slurpuff battled against {{an|Tierno}}'s {{p|Raichu}} in the [[Lumiose Conference]], but lost to his {{TP|Tierno|Blastoise}}.

In ''[[XY128|A Riveting Rivalry!]]'', Sawyer used Slurpuff in his semi-final battle against Ash, where he went up against [[Ash's Goodra]]. The face-off ended with both Pokémon fainting simultaneously.

He appeared again in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', during a flashback.

Slurpuff's known moves are {{m|Electro Ball}}{{tt|*|Slurpuff cannot legally learn Electro Ball in the games.}}, {{m|Attract}}, {{m|Energy Ball}}, {{m|Flamethrower}}, {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}, {{m|Fairy Wind}}, and {{m|Cotton Guard}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sawyer
|pkmn=Aegislash
|stage1=Honedge
|stage2=Doublade
|type1=Steel
|type2=Ghost
|img=Sawyer {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Honedge|1=Doublade}}.png
|img2=Sawyer Aegislash {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Shield|1=Blade}} Forme.png
|cap=Sawyer's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Honedge|1=Doublade}}
|cap2=Sawyer's Aegislash in its {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Shield|1=Blade}} Forme
|epnum=XY106
|epname=A Meeting of Two Journeys!
|vaen=Justin Anselmi
|vaennote=as Honedge and Doublade
|vaen2=Marc Swint
|vaen2note=as Aegislash
|desc={{p|Aegislash}} first appeared as a {{p|Honedge}} in ''[[XY106|A Meeting of Two Journeys!]]''. It battled against [[Ash's Pikachu]], but lost.

In ''[[XY119|A Full-Strength Battle Surprise!]]'', it was revealed that Honedge had evolved into {{p|Doublade}}. It battled against {{AP|Noivern}}, but despite having the type advantage, lost.

In ''[[XY126|Valuable Experience for All!]]'', in the [[Lumiose Conference]], it was revealed that Doublade had evolved into Aegislash. It battled against {{an|Tierno}}'s {{p|Ludicolo}} and won, but was then defeated by {{p|Raichu}}.

It was later used in ''[[XY127|Analysis Versus Passion!]]'' and ''[[XY128|A Riveting Rivalry!]]'', where it battled against Pikachu in the semi-finals and was once again defeated by him.

It appeared again in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', during a flashback.

Aegislash's known moves are {{m|Fury Cutter}}, {{m|Iron Defense}}, {{m|Slash}}, {{m|Night Slash}}, {{m|Swords Dance}}, {{m|King's Shield}}, and {{m|Sacred Sword}}, and its Ability is {{a|Stance Change}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sawyer
|pkmn=Clawitzer
|type1=Water
|img=Sawyer Clawitzer.png
|epnum=XY119
|epname=A Full-Strength Battle Surprise!
|vaen=Billy Bob Thompson
|desc={{p|Clawitzer}} first appeared in ''[[XY119|A Full-Strength Battle Surprise!]]'', where it was used in a three-on-three battle against Ash. It managed to defeat Noivern and Hawlucha, but lost to Greninja.

It reappeared in ''[[XY127|Analysis Versus Passion!]]'', being used in the battle against Ash in the [[Lumiose Conference]]. It managed to defeat {{AP|Talonflame}}, but was soon defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}}.

It appeared again in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', during a flashback.

Clawitzer's known moves are {{m|Crabhammer}}, {{m|Heal Pulse}}, {{m|Dragon Pulse}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Aqua Jet}}, and {{m|Water Pulse}}{{tt|*|Unseen; the move was interrupted mid-use}}, and its Ability is {{a|Mega Launcher}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Sawyer
|pkmn=Slaking
|type1=Normal
|img=Sawyer Slaking.png
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|epnum=XY126
|epname=Valuable Experience for All!
|desc={{p|Slaking}} first appeared in ''[[XY126|Valuable Experience for All!]]'', where it was seen defeating a {{p|Medicham}} in the second round of the [[Lumiose Conference]].

Slaking was later used in the semi-finals against Ash in ''[[XY127|Analysis Versus Passion!]]''. It battled against {{AP|Hawlucha}} and defeated him, but was then defeated by [[Ash's Talonflame]].

It appeared again in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', during a flashback.

Slaking's known moves are {{m|Slack Off}}, {{m|Counter}}, and {{m|Hammer Arm}}, and its Ability is {{a|Truant}}.}}
